subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out from Partner Corp. I'm glad to hear about the potential synergy between our product roadmaps.

I'd be happy to schedule an introductory call. Here are some available slots next week:

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00  
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for you, and I'll send over the calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details — for privacy and security reasons, I'm not able to share direct contact information for our senior leadership. However, I'd be happy to facilitate introductions through the appropriate channels once we've had our initial discussion and aligned on the scope of potential collaboration.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
